extraction.one_line_summary: MATTHEWS Michael outsprinted COLBRELLI Sonny in a two-up drag race on the uphill finish, repeating his 2019 stage win on identical terrain.
tactical_patterns: Breakaway caught at 7.7km after wrong turn at roundabout; no intermediate formation survived wind splits.
Ineos Grenadiers isolated CARAPAZ Richard after crash on wet descent, failed to control positioning for summit finish.
MATTHEWS Michael positioned opposite road side to COLBRELLI Sonny in final 3.2km, forcing mano-a-mano rather than slipstream sprint.

rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: Course familiarity from 2019 win enabled precise positioning split from rival on uphill finish sprint.
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: negative: Required medical assistance post-finish despite winning sprint; recent bronchitis compromised recovery capacity.
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Crash on descent forced Grenadiers into defensive relay mode, eliminated GC positioning threat.
rider_signals.PETERS Nans: negative: Bridging effort negated by immediate puncture with no team car access due to small gap.
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: neutral: Active in Jumbo closing phase but team had no protected sprinter for lumpy finish.
